title: ramah #7411
definition:
1) to cast, shoot, hurl
    1a) (Qal)
        1a1) to throw
        1a2) bow-shooters, bowmen (participle)
    1b) (Piel) to throw down
 2) to beguile, deceive, mislead, deal treacherously
    2a) (Piel)
        2a1) to beguile, deceive, mislead, trick
        2a2) to deal treacherously with, betray
nasbUsage:

    NASB:  to cast, shoot
